category_sources: Official VideoLAN GitLab project is under the rist/librist namespace.
source_facts.description expands RIST as Reliable Internet Stream Transport.
docs_sources: Official VideoLAN GitLab wiki lists LibRIST Documentation, command examples, URL syntax, and function reference pages.
Official project page is the canonical repository and overview surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://code.videolan.org/rist/librist, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Reliable Internet Stream Transport.
source_facts.executables lists sender, receiver, tunnel, and udp2udp tools.
